zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Peverell於大約1080年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，他的父親Willielmus de Peverell11078歲，母親Francis47歲。他和Adelicia de Verdun至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1133年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾布享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Peverell was born about 1080, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Willielmus de Peverell, was 11078 and his mother, Francis, was 47. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Adelicia de Verdun. He died about 1133, in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Peverell est né environ 1080, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Willielmus de Peverell, avait 11078 ans et sa mère, Francis, avait 47 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Adelicia de Verdun. Il est décédé environ 1133, à Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Peverell um 1080 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Willielmus de Peverell 11078 und seine Mutter Francis 47. Er hatte mit Adelicia de Verdun mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1133 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Peverell è nato il circa 1080 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Willielmus de Peverell, aveva 11078 anni e il suo madre, Francis, aveva 47 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Adelicia de Verdun. Morì circa 1133, nel Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Peverellが約1080年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Willielmus de Peverellは11078歳，母Francisは47歳であった。彼はAdelicia de Verdunとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1133年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボウルンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Peverell(이)가 대략 1080년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Willielmus de Peverell(은)는 11078세였고, 그의 어머니 Francis(은)는 47세였다. 그는 Adelicia de Verdun(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1133년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 부른에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Peverell nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Willielmus de Peverell, tinha 11078 anos e sua mãe, Francis, tinha 47 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Adelicia de Verdun. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1133, em Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Peverell родился около 1080 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Willielmus de Peverell было 11078 лет, а матери, которую звали Francis, 47. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Adelicia de Verdun. Он умер около 1133 г. в местности бурн, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Adelicia de Verdun. Murió aproximadamente 1133, en Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
